en.text: The Istisqa' prayer consists of two Rak'a

ar.text: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ أَبِي بَكْرٍ، عَنْ عَبَّادِ بْنِ تَمِيمٍ، عَنْ عَمِّهِ، أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم اسْتَسْقَى فَصَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ، وَقَلَبَ رِدَاءَهُ‏.‏

al.text: Transmeton xhaxhai i Abbad bin Temimit: Pejgamberi (s.a.v.s.) u lut për shi, i fali dy rekate namaz dhe e ktheu mantelin e tij mbrapsht.

en.narrator: Narrated `Abbad bin Tamim from his uncle who said:
en.text: "The Prophet (ﷺ) invoked Allah for rain and offered a two rak`at prayer and he put his cloak inside out."
